steps.t: Aldburg is south-east of Edoras, nestled near the White Mountains. Follow the road that leads to Aldburg and keep an eye out for danger.
Aldburg is south-east of Edoras, nestled near the White Mountains. Continue to follow the road that leads to Aldburg and keep an eye out for danger.
Aldburg is south-east of Edoras, nestled near the White Mountains. Gandalf ask you to head to Aldburg and deliver the news of Éomer's release and the …
Éothain is at Aldburg in the Eastfold. You should seek out and speak with Éomer's cousin, Éothain.
Arcil can be found in the Mead Hall of Aldburg. Éothain recommended that you seek out the Thane, Arcil, who has been regent of Aldburg in Éomer's abse…
